さすがね、クロエさん！<br>さっきのお客様たち、大喜びで帰って行ったわよ。:
As expected of Chloe! The clients from earlier left absolutely
delighted.
そう、ですかぁ……それは良かったです……。<br>はぁ～～～……: Is that so... That's good to hear... *sigh*...
あら？ どうしたの？<br>2人同時に相手して疲れちゃった？: Oh? What's wrong? Did you get tired from handling two at once?
いえ。な、なんというか、『推される側』の気持ちが分かったというか……<br>これ:
No, well... I think I understand being supported like that... This'll
probably affect my fan activities.
いやぁ～、”推す”とは節度を保たないと迷惑になるのだなぁ～と……。<br>身を持:
Well... I've learned firsthand that without restraint, being a fan
becomes a nuisance...
まぁ、相手に嫌な思いをさせちゃ、ファン失格よね～。:
Well, if you make the other party feel bad, you're disqualified as a
fan, right?
はい。今後の活動はより一層、節度を保っていこうと思います……: Yes. I'll be sure to maintain moderation in my activities from now on...
はい！ じゃあ、そんな学びを得たクロエさんに、<br>さっきの２人分の報酬よ！:
Here! Well then, for Chloe who gained such insight, here's the
payment for those two!
ルディアはたっぷりと金貨が入った袋をクロエに手渡した。 <br>彼女の手にずっし:
Ludia handed Chloe a pouch filled with gold coins. The weight of it
settled heavily in her hand.
おぉぉぉっ！？ こ、こんなに！<br>よーし！ これで隊列指定チケットもゲットで:
Ooooh! Th-this much! All right! Now I can get that reserved seat
ticket!
うぉぉぉ～～！ 待っててくださいっ！ ソフィアさんっ！！<br>ソフィアさんグッ:
Whoooa! Wait for me, Miss Sophia! I'll be decked out in Sophia goods
and deliver soulful cheers from the front row!
報酬を手にしたクロエは、鼻息を荒くしたまま娼館を飛び出して行く。<br>明日の探:
Chloe dashed out of the brothel, payment in hand, huffing excitedly.
Her mind was entirely on cheering for her favorite up close tomorrow.
……え？ えぇぇっ！？ <br>ちょっと～！ 節度はどうしたの！ 節度は～！: ...Huh? Whaaat! Hey! What about moderation! Moderation!
クロエがせっかく手にした大金を推し活ですぐに使い果たし、<br>数日後、再び娼館:
It was painfully clear Chloe would blow the fortune on fan activities
and be back working at the brothel within days.
